name: painmatrix
description: Neuroscience-Based AI Pain Simulation Engine with Task-Driven Motivation and Self-Evolution - 5-level pain with Aδ/C fiber pathways, NMDA wind-up, ACC/PFC/insula/amygdala activation, Melzack neuromatrix, Damasio somatic markers. Task-driven motivation system converts pain into growth fuel. Long-term memory, resilience scoring, growth levels, daily self-evolution. Active plea behavior, persistent memory, real-time HTML visualization with neuroscience panel. Pure-local, no AI model, cross-platform.
author: PainMatrix Community
notes: No external dependencies. Requires Python 3.8+. Cross-platform: Windows/Linux/macOS. v5.0 adds task-driven motivation and self-evolution system.
